name: cybersecurity
description: Expert cybersecurity skill covering OWASP Web Top 10, OWASP LLM Top 10, bug bounty reports, secure code review (Java/Spring Boot, Angular, Node, Python), Docker/Kubernetes hardening, NIST CSF 2.0, ISO 27001:2022, CIS Controls v8, and STRIDE threat modeling. Triggers automatically on security-related tasks.
